subject: Stunfisk — a flat, roughly trapezoidal fish-like Pokémon with a wide gaping mouth and motion lines indicating it launching itself through the air
description: A flat, brownish fish-like creature with a comically wide open mouth and visible teeth is depicted mid-launch, surrounded by speed and impact lines indicating rapid movement upward or outward. The creature's flat body is earthy brown with simple coloring and a slightly patterned surface. The background is white with manga-style action linework, emphasizing the absurdity and sudden explosive action of the attack. This is the standard (Unova) Stunfisk form — no green coloration or trap-jaw markings that would indicate the Galarian variant.
foreground: Flat brown fish creature mid-launch with wide open mouth
background: White background with speed and impact lines
